name: antigravity-seo
description: Comprehensive SEO analysis skill suite for Antigravity. Includes technical SEO, content quality, schema markup, image optimization, sitemap architecture, GEO/AEO, backlinks, local SEO, maps intelligence, semantic clustering, SXO, drift monitoring, e-commerce SEO, Google APIs, and deterministic reporting workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run SEO audits, schema checks, GEO analysis, and reports in Antigravity.
interface.longDescription: Antigravity SEO is a local SEO analysis suite with 1 orchestrator, 26 specialist workflows, 24 Antigravity agent profiles, shared cache artifacts, optional API integrations, and deterministic headless wrappers for repeatable audits and reports.
defaultPrompt: Audit this website for SEO issues.
Check schema and Core Web Vitals for this URL.
Build an SEO action plan for this business.
